ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "time_mst" TEXT /* Time in MST format */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "dew_point_c" REAL /* Dew point in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity */,
  "sea_level_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "gust_speed_km_h" REAL /* Gust speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions (e.g., cloudy, sunny) */,
  "wind_dir_degrees" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "date_utc" TEXT /* Date in UTC format */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection frequency */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind direction */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the frequency in minutes or hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
